summary: Frontend testing complete for Grand River Spas color picker and product specs verification. All 12 requested features verified working correctly.

Grand River Sturgeon 2: Shows ONLY Walnut and Taupe cabinet colors (NO CoastalGray/Barnwood/Black) - PASS
Grand River Sturgeon 2: NO corner color selector visible - PASS

Grand River Swift 240v: Corner color selector visible with Match Cabinet and Black Slate options - PASS
Grand River Manistee 240v (/products/gr-manistee): Shows ONLY White and Opal shell colors (NO Silver) - PASS
Grand River Manistee 240v: Shows ONLY Walnut and Taupe cabinet colors - PASS
Grand River Manistee 240v: NO corner color selector visible - PASS
Grand River Chariton 2 (/products/gr-chariton-2): Shows 63 jets (not 61) - PASS
Grand River Chariton 2: Shows 6 persons - PASS
Grand River Chariton 2: Shows dimensions 92x92x37.5 - PASS
Grand River Chariton 2: Corner color selector visible - PASS
Grand River Thornapple 2 (/products/gr-thornapple-2): Shows 7 persons (not 6) - PASS
Grand River Thornapple 2: Shows 54 jets - PASS
Grand River Thornapple 2: Shows Non-Lounge layout - PASS
Grand River Thornapple 2: Shows dimensions 86x86x37 - PASS
Grand River Muskegon 2 (/products/gr-muskegon-2): Shows 6 persons (not 7) - PASS
Grand River Muskegon 2: Shows 41 jets - PASS

Grand River Muskegon 2: Shows dimensions 86x86x37 - PASS

Grand River Sturgeon Eco: Shows Silver/Opal shells only, Walnut/Taupe cabinets only, NO corner option - PASS
Grand River Swift Eco 120v (/products/gr-swift-eco): Shows 120v/15amp plug-and-play electrical - PASS
Grand River Swift Eco 120v: Shows Eco Series label - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: products.js correctly implements restricted color options for Sturgeon (shellColors: ['silver', 'opal'], cabinetColors: ['walnut', 'taupe'], hasCornerOption: false)

products.js correctly implements full color options for Swift 240v (shellColors: ['white', 'silver', 'opal'], cabinetColors: ['coastalGray', 'walnut', 'barnwood', 'black'], no hasCornerOption field = corner option enabled)
products.js correctly implements restricted colors for Manistee 240v (shellColors: ['white', 'opal'], cabinetColors: ['walnut', 'taupe'], hasCornerOption: false)
ProductDetailPage.jsx correctly uses hasCornerOption !== false check at line 122 to conditionally show corner selector
ProductDetailPage.jsx getGRColorComboImageUrl function at line 38 correctly generates visualizer URLs with modelFamily prefix
Eco series models correctly show 120v/15amp electrical specs for plug-and-play operation
Dynasty Paradise Bay III correctly shows 92x102x39 dimensions (not 92x92)
seed_data_creation: N/A - All product data hardcoded in frontend/src/data/products.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 requested features verified working: (1) Sturgeon products show ONLY Silver/Opal shells and Walnut/Taupe cabinets with NO corner option. (2) Swift 240v shows all 3 shells, 4 cabinets, WITH corner option (Match Cabinet and Black Slate). (3) Manistee 240v shows ONLY White/Opal shells and Walnut/Taupe cabinets with NO corner option. (4) Chariton 2 shows 63 jets, 6 persons, 92x92x37.5 dims, WITH corner option. (5) Thornapple 2 shows 7 persons, 54 jets, Non-Lounge, 86x86x37. (6) Muskegon 2 shows 6 persons, 41 jets, Lounge, 86x86x37. (7) Color picker switching works smoothly with image updates. (8) Black Slate corner option updates image correctly. (9) Saunas page heater filter works. (10) Grand River model comparison dropdown works. (11) Dynasty Paradise Bay shows 92x102x39 dims. (12) Eco series models show 120v plug-and-play specs. Key data-testid attributes: shell-color-{white|silver|opal}, cabinet-color-{coastalGray|walnut|barnwood|black|taupe}, corner-color-match, corner-color-black, grand-river-compare-select, filter-heaters.
